name: UniversityOfBathPureResearchOutput
description: JSON Structure for the University of Bath Pure API ResearchOutput object (Pure 5.33.3-3).

pureId.description: Pure database ID of the object, prefer using the UUID if it is present on the entity

uuid.description: UUID, this is the primary identity of the entity

modifiedBy.description: Username of the user that performed a modification

modifiedDate.description: Date and time of last modification

portalUrl.description: URL of the content on the Pure Portal

previousUuids.description: UUIDs of other content items which have been merged into this content item (or similar)

version.description: Used to guard against conflicting updates. For new content this is null, and for existing content the current value. The property should never be modified by a client, except in the rare case where the client wants to perform an update irrespective of if other clients have made updates in the meanti

peerReview.description: Indicates whether the research output is peer reviewed or not. Query the /research-outputs/allowed-peer-review-configurations endpoint for allowed values.

internationalPeerReview.description: Indicates whether the research output is internationally peer reviewed or not. Query the /research-outputs/allowed-peer-review-configurations endpoint for allowed values.

publicationStatuses.description: Manage the research output's different statuses and dates these were reached.

organizations.description: A collection of organizational unit affiliations.

externalOrganizations.description: A collection of external organization affiliations.

totalNumberOfContributors.description: The total number of authors from author collaborations.

submissionYear.description: The submission year of the research output.

electronicVersions.description: Electronic versions of this research output.

additionalFiles.description: Additional files related to this research output.

links.description: Additional links associated with this research output.

keywordGroups.description: Groups of keywords associated with the research output.

descriptions.description: A list of descriptions for this research output. Query the relevant /research-outputs/allowed-*-description-types endpoint for allowed types.

identifiers.description: Identifiers related to the research output.

activities.description: Activities related to the research output,

equipment.description: Equipment related to the research output.

projects.description: Projects related to the research output.

images.description: Image files with a maximum file size of 1MB

fundingDetails.description: The funding details for the research output
